Class Schedule

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.model.Schedule
public class Schedule extends Object
Represents a Schedule in the SmartHome system.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Schedule(String scheduleId, String name, String device, String action, String time, String recurrence, boolean active)
    Creates a schedule using the same value for device identifier and display name.
    Schedule(String scheduleId, String name, String deviceId, String device, String action, String time, String recurrence, boolean active)
    Creates a schedule with explicit device identifier and name.

  • Constructor Details

    • Schedule

      public Schedule(String scheduleId, String name, String deviceId, String device, String action, String time, String recurrence, boolean active)
      Creates a schedule with explicit device identifier and name.
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - unique schedule identifier
      name - schedule name
      deviceId - target device identifier
      device - target device display name
      action - action to execute
      time - execution time pattern
      recurrence - recurrence mode
      active - whether the schedule is active

    • Schedule

      public Schedule(String scheduleId, String name, String device, String action, String time, String recurrence, boolean active)
      Creates a schedule using the same value for device identifier and display name.
      Parameters:
      scheduleId - unique schedule identifier
      name - schedule name
      device - target device identifier and name
      action - action to execute
      time - execution time pattern
      recurrence - recurrence mode
      active - whether the schedule is active
